title: Rotated Trial Keys
description: Trial Keys that point ahead when held
body:
## About
- Trial Keys held in hands will now point ahead
- Not rotated in inventory or on the ground
- Works with texture packs


|![Trial Key](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9rUIWPDd/images/0e75f91ea9b48e6d463c9299f8198f492f66453d.png)|![Ominous Key](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9rUIWPDd/images/bf2c189bc72ce40b455f9038a53fda5bed343099.png)|
|----|-----|
|![Steve with ominous key](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9rUIWPDd/images/d14f92b83cfcb5c54d6c9e6cc55429c0010b9a42.png)|![Steve with key](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9rUIWPDd/images/92c532d030c20f4849cf3fbf19a35d79c242135a.png)|
